350.issue_title: scaffold_artifact: proactive schema exposure and v1 doc-type coverage

cycles.name: C1: get_context_schema + TemplateSchema removal + error path
cycles.goal: Implement ArtifactManager.get_context_schema(), remove TemplateSchema, and update error_handling.py to use dict directly.
cycles.exit_criteria: get_context_schema returns valid JSON Schema for V2 types; ConfigError for generic_doc; artifact_manager.py has no TemplateSchema import; error path returns dict for V2 errors, TemplateSchema.to_dict() still works for V1; all tests green; quality gates 10.00 + mypy pass

deliverables.description: TemplateSchema import removed from artifact_manager.py; V2 error raise uses self.get_context_schema() instead; TemplateSchema class STAYS in template_introspector.py for V1 pipeline use
error_handling.py: exc.schema handled as dict-or-TemplateSchema: isinstance check routes to exc.schema (dict) or exc.schema.to_dict() (TemplateSchema)
test_validation_error_enhancement.py updated: fixture replaced by JSON Schema dict; assertions updated to JSON Schema structure (properties/required)
test_scaffold_validation_e2e.py updated: 'optional' assertion removed; 'properties' assertion added to validate JSON Schema format
test_scaffold_artifact.py: no change needed — file contained no TemplateSchema mocks or schema assertions; verified during C1 audit
test_artifact_manager.py: new tests for get_context_schema (V2 happy path returns JSON Schema dict; generic_doc raises ConfigError)
exceptions.py to_resource_dict(): same isinstance guard for dict vs TemplateSchema

cycles.name: C2: ScaffoldSchemaTool + server registration
cycles.goal: Implement ScaffoldSchemaTool (read-only, A4 pattern) and register it in server.py.
cycles.exit_criteria: scaffold_schema in tool manifest; execute() delegates to manager with no extraction logic; input_schema.artifact_type.enum populated from registry; ScaffoldSchemaTool inherits BaseTool not BranchMutatingTool; all tests green; gates pass

deliverables.description: ScaffoldSchemaTool registered in server.py alongside ScaffoldArtifactTool
test_scaffold_schema_tool.py created: happy path, V1 type error, input_schema enum test
test_all_tools.py updated: ScaffoldSchemaTool added to expected tool list

cycles.name: C3: start-issue.prompt.md base_branch correction
cycles.goal: Replace hardcoded base_branch='main' with 4-step git_list_branches derivation algorithm.
cycles.exit_criteria: Old step 2 split into derive (step 2) + create (step 3); algorithm matches design §3.5 exactly (git_list_branches remote=True, filter */{parent_issue_number}-*, exact-one match required, stop on zero/multi); get_parent_branch absent; all subsequent steps renumbered; no unrelated changes

deliverables.description: .github/prompts/start-issue.prompt.md: old step 2 split into new step 2 (git_list_branches derivation with parent_issue guard, zero/multi ambiguity stop, fallback to main) and new step 3 (create_branch); all subsequent steps renumbered +1; get_parent_branch NOT used; no other content changed
